title: elaeodendron athranthum
intro: Elaeodendron athranthum, also known as the Orange Cassia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Elaeodendron athranthum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
